description.en: GCN provided a simple and effective layer for learning from graph structure and node features together. It became a standard baseline for semi-supervised node classification and graph representation learning.
description.zh: GCN 提供了一个简单有效的层，用于同时从图结构和节点特征中学习。它成为半监督节点分类和图表示学习的标准基线。

html.en: GCN provided a simple and effective layer for learning from graph structure and node features together. It became a standard baseline for semi-supervised node classification and graph representation learning.
html.zh: GCN 提供了一个简单有效的层，用于同时从图结构和节点特征中学习。它成为半监督节点分类和图表示学习的标准基线。

html.en: Node features are averaged through normalized graph neighborhoods and transformed into class predictions. The interactive demo focuses on the steps that connect the source material to the visible system behavior.
html.zh: 节点特征通过归一化图邻域进行聚合，并转换为类别预测。 互动演示会突出这些步骤如何把资料线索与可见的系统行为连接起来。

html.en: Experts generally treat GCN as the model that made graph neural networks accessible to a broad machine-learning audience. Its long-term legacy is the normalized-neighbor aggregation layer used as a reference point for later graph models.
html.zh: 专家通常把 GCN 视为让图神经网络进入更广泛机器学习社群的模型。它的长期影响在于归一化邻居聚合层成为后续图模型的参照点。

artifact.en: Graph convolutional network for semi-supervised classification
artifact.zh: 用于半监督分类的图卷积网络

demo.en: Node features are averaged through normalized graph neighborhoods and transformed into class predictions.
demo.zh: 节点特征通过归一化图邻域进行聚合，并转换为类别预测。

text.en: Each node mixes information from nearby nodes.
text.zh: 每个节点混合附近节点的信息。

text.en: Few labels guide predictions across the graph.
text.zh: 少量标签引导整张图上的预测。

title.en: Semi-Supervised Classification with Graph Convolutional Networks
title.zh: 使用图卷积网络进行半监督分类

license.en: Reference link only; local explainers are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地解释图为原创重绘。

label.en: Semi-Supervised Classification with Graph Convolutional Networks
label.zh: 《使用图卷积网络进行半监督分类》

text.en: Node features are averaged through normalized graph neighborhoods and transformed into class predictions.
text.zh: 节点特征通过归一化图邻域进行聚合，并转换为类别预测。
